i18n.license_tip_commercial_use: The licensed material and derivatives may be used for commercial purposes.
i18n.license_tip_distribution: The licensed material may be distributed.
i18n.license_tip_modification: The licensed material may be modified.
i18n.license_tip_patent_use: This license provides an express grant of patent rights from contributors.
i18n.license_tip_private_use: The licensed material may be used and modified in private.
i18n.license_tip_disclose_source: Source code must be made available when the licensed material is distributed.
i18n.license_tip_license_notice: A copy of the license and copyright notice must be included with the licensed material.
i18n.license_tip_license_notice_source: A copy of the license and copyright notice must be included with the licensed material in source form, but is not required for binaries.
i18n.license_tip_network_use: Users who interact with the licensed material via network are given the right to receive a copy of the source code.
i18n.license_tip_same_license: Modifications must be released under the same license when distributing the licensed material. In some cases a similar or related license may be used.
i18n.license_tip_same_license_file: Modifications of existing files must be released under the same license when distributing the licensed material. In some cases a similar or related license may be used.
i18n.license_tip_same_license_library: Modifications must be released under the same license when distributing the licensed material. In some cases a similar or related license may be used, or this condition may not apply to works that use the licensed material as a library.
i18n.license_tip_state_changes: Changes made to the licensed material must be documented.
i18n.license_tip_liability: This license includes a limitation of liability.
i18n.license_tip_no_patent: This license explicitly states that it does NOT grant any rights in the patents of contributors.
i18n.license_tip_trademark: This license explicitly states that it does NOT grant trademark rights, even though licenses without such a statement probably do not grant any implicit trademark rights.
i18n.license_tip_warranty: This license explicitly states that it does NOT provide any warranty.
i18n.browse_skill_files: Or browse the skill files below
i18n.skills_intro: A skill is a package of structured files that teaches an AI coding agent how to work with a specific tool or framework.
i18n.skills_intro_auto: The skill below was generated by Great Docs from this project's documentation. Install it in your agent and it will be able to run commands, edit configuration, write content, and troubleshoot problems without step-by-step guidance from you.
i18n.skills_intro_curated: Install it in your agent and it will be able to run commands, edit configuration, write content, and troubleshoot problems without step-by-step guidance from you.
i18n.install_all_in_project: install all skills in a project
i18n.tell_the_agent_to_fetch: Tell the agent to fetch these skill files
i18n.tags_intro: Tags provide a way to categorize and cross-reference pages across this documentation site. Select any tag below to discover related pages, or use tags to navigate between topics that share a common theme.
i18n.status_desc_deprecated: May be removed in a future release
i18n.mcp_completions_desc: This server supports argument completions. When an AI agent calls a tool or prompt, the server can suggest valid values for parameters (e.g., listing available page names, valid config keys, or known symbols). This enables tab-completion-like behavior in MCP-aware clients.

default_description: Orchestrate fleets of Claude Code agents across pluggable backends like cmux and superset.
package_description: Orchestrate fleets of Claude Code agents across pluggable backends like cmux and superset.
